title: Coach Josh Boxing
description: Full-stack web platform for a boxing gym with 200+ athletes trained and 37 five-star Google reviews. Built on Vercel with GymDesk integration, micro-animations, technical SEO/GEO, and automated digital outreach pipelines.
longDescription:
Designed, developed, and deployed a high-converting web platform for Coach Josh Boxing — a boxing gym in Hamden, CT serving kids, teens, adults, and women. The site features a dynamic class schedule with GymDesk integration, automated free trial signup flows, and a responsive design optimized for mobile bookings.

Key technical achievements include comprehensive technical SEO and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) that dramatically improved local search visibility, resulting in a pipeline serving 200+ athletes. Built automated digital outreach systems including SMS integration, email marketing automations, and a merchandise infrastructure plan.

The platform supports multiple class programs (Kids Boxing ages 6-12, Teens & Adults 13+, Women's Boxing, and Private Training at $100/hr) with tiered monthly memberships ranging from $100-$175/mo. Social proof integration showcases 37 five-star Google reviews directly on-site.

title: Coach Josh Official
description: Digital course platform and content hub for boxing training — featuring an interactive eBook, video course, elite 1:1 coaching, and a 400+ member community. Full-stack Next.js ecosystem with Stripe payments and PWA distribution.
longDescription:
Coach Josh Official is a comprehensive digital-first boxing training platform built to monetize the expertise of a creator with 150M+ social media views. The platform houses a complete product ascension model:

• Striking Blueprint ($49) — A digital guide covering footwork drills, heavy bag workouts, defensive head movement, a 4x/week strength program, and printable workout logs.
• Boxing Blueprint Video Course ($197) — The flagship product featuring 4 deep-dive modules on striking mechanics, conditioning circuits, defense, and footwork progressions. Includes everything in the Striking Blueprint.
• Elite 1:1 Coaching ($497/mo) — Premium tier with 2-4 private calls per month, custom training programs, and direct access to Coach Josh.
• 1:1 Private Sessions ($100/session) — Single 45-minute online coaching sessions.
• Discord Community (Free) — A 400+ member community with weekly live Q&A sessions, form check feedback, and exclusive training content.

Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Mux video streaming, and Stripe subscription management. Features the interactive 'Boxing Blueprint' eBook with Apple Human Interface-inspired motion design, a Progressive Web App for mobile distribution, and a unified account system linking all product tiers.

title: Enterprise Video Solutions
description: Custom video engineering solutions for major media clients including NBC, NPR, Forbes, and Hedgeye — contributing to a $4M+ book of business.
longDescription:
Engineered bespoke video implementations for high-profile enterprise clients using JW Player's advanced capabilities. Solutions included custom advertising integrations (VAST/VPAID) with Google IMA and FreeWheel, DRM/CDM secure playback implementation, and specialized player behaviors using JavaScript across web, mobile, and CTV platforms.

Key outcomes include managing a $4M+ book of business, significant churn reduction through proactive solution architecture, and mentoring programs that improved team service quality. Created internal knowledge base infrastructure across Frontend and Backend verticals.

title: Players Club Community
description: A 400+ member Discord community for the Coach Josh brand — weekly live Q&A, form checks, exclusive drills, and accountability.
longDescription:
Founded and administer the 'Players Club' Discord server for the Coach Josh Official brand. This community serves as the free entry point in the product ecosystem, providing technique feedback through form check videos, weekly live Q&A sessions with Coach Josh, exclusive training tips and drills, and an accountability-driven environment for fighters at all levels.

The community strategy drives engagement and upsells into paid products (Striking Blueprint, Boxing Blueprint, Elite Coaching) while maintaining genuine value for free members. Responsible for community management, bot integration, engagement strategy, and content scheduling.

title: Project Negus
description: Exploration of the cultures and people of the diaspora through various art mediums — panel discussions, screenings, and community events.
longDescription: The Negus Project was the exploration of the cultures and people of the diaspora through various art mediums, encouraging the rediscovery and collaboration of African roots. Goal: Celebration of our people, by our people; The Unification of Us. Included events like panel discussions on Childish Gambino's 'Awaken My Love!', community film screenings, and collaborative art showcases.

videos.title: Panel Discussion
videos.description: Community panel discussion on cultural impact.
